holdings.infoBox: TXS is an equity ETF with a total of 220 individual holdings. The top holdings are CrowdStrike Holdings stock at 7.97%, Tesla at 4.90%, The Charles Schwab Corporation at 4.59%, Digital Realty Trust at 4.42%, and McKesson at 4.12%.

overview.description: The Texas Capital Texas Equity Index ETF (TXS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Texas Capital Texas Equity index. The fund seeks to track a tier-weighted-equity index comprised of companies headquartered in Texas. The fund invests in various industries, sectors, and sizes TXS was launched on Jul 12, 2023 and is issued by Texas Capital.
